title: 12 hardcoded .font(.system(size:)) calls — responsive sizing bypasses AppText
description: MainScreenView has 12 inline system(size:) calls with ternary expressions for size-class responsiveness. Comments acknowledge the gap. Labels don't grow with Accessibility Larger Text.
recommended_fix: Add AppText scale variants using @ScaledMetric anchor, replace all 12 calls

title: Deprecated Color.status.* and Color.accent.* aliases still used — 66 call-sites across 8 files
description: AppTheme deprecated lowercase Color extensions. 66 call-sites continue using them. Worst: TrainingPlanView (35), NutritionView (11).
recommended_fix: Global rename to AppColor.Status.* and AppColor.Accent.*, delete deprecated extension block

title: Deprecated Color.appOrange*/appBlue*/appSurface/appStroke — 26 call-sites across 4 files
description: MainScreenView caches deprecated aliases. StatsView uses them in chart helpers. AuthHubView uses appBlue2/appSurface/appStroke.
recommended_fix: Replace with AppColor.*: appOrange1→Brand.warmSoft, appBlue2→Brand.secondary, etc. Delete deprecated block.

title: Token pipeline covers ~60% of AppTheme — chart, motion, opacity, size, layout tokens absent
description: 10 chart colours, all AppMotion/AppSpring/AppEasing, AppOpacity, AppSize, AppLayout missing from tokens.json. Invisible to CI and Figma sync.
evidence: No chart, motion, opacity, size, or layout sections in tokens.json
recommended_fix: Add missing sections to tokens.json, extend Style Dictionary transform

title: Hardcoded 32pt hero title — should use AppText.hero
description: First screen every user sees has hardcoded font that doesn't adapt to Accessibility text sizes.

title: 9 hardcoded icon/symbol sizes across 7 files — AppText.icon* tokens available but unused
description: Values 28, 32, 36, 40, 56 used as raw .font(.system(size:)) for SF Symbols. AppText defines iconSmall through iconDisplay.

title: 10 ad-hoc .animation() literals bypass AppMotion/AppSpring/AppEasing tokens
description: AppMotion defines spring and easing tokens. 10 animation calls use inline literals. Even AppDesignSystemComponents has 2 inline literals.

title: Two inline GeometryReader progress bars bypass ProgressBar component
description: ProgressBar in DesignSystem has token colours, reduce-motion, AppSpring.progress animation. NutritionView duplicates pattern inline twice without reduce-motion.
evidence: Inline GeometryReader + ZStack progress bar pattern

title: No dark-mode adaptive colour variants — all tokens light-mode only
description: All Surface tokens are white-based (rgba 255,255,255). No dark-mode variants in asset catalog. @Environment colorScheme referenced in only 7 files. App supports colorScheme preference but tokens don't adapt.
recommended_fix: Define dark variants in asset catalog for Text, Surface, Background, Border token families

title: Chart (10), Selection (2), and appWarmTint tokens missing from pipeline — invisible to CI
description: Three token groups in AppTheme have no tokens.json entries. Invisible to make tokens-check and Figma sync.
recommended_fix: Add to tokens.json and Style Dictionary transform

title: Inline opacity literals bypass AppOpacity tokens — disabled/subtle/hover under-utilized
description: AppOpacity defines disabled(0.15), subtle(0.12), hover(0.08). Multiple .opacity(0.12) and .opacity(0.15) use magic numbers. AppOpacity.hover has zero usages.

title: AppText.metricM uses private Font.custom('SF Pro Rounded') — brittle across OS versions
description: All other AppText uses public Font.system(design: .rounded). This one uses private font name.

title: Raw Color.black.opacity(0.4) scrim — no AppColor.Overlay.scrim token exists
description: Modal backdrop uses raw literal. No semantic token for overlay scrim.

title: Hardcoded 56pt padding — AppSize.tabBarClearance token exists but unused
description: Token exists exactly for this use case but call-site uses literal.

title: AppColor.Focus.ring and AppOpacity.hover defined but never referenced in any view
description: Two tokens with zero usages. Maintenance liability.
evidence: grep returns 0 view results for both
recommended_fix: Wire to interactive elements or document/remove
